name: cen2_chrII
description: Centromere 2 (cen2) on S. pombe chromosome II. ~65 kb. cnt2 central core (~7 kb, unique sequence) flanked by imr2L/R innermost repeats and otr2L/R outer dg/dh cassettes. The four cassettes per side are oriented asymmetrically; otr2 carries the highest dg/dh copy number of the three centromeres on the left arm.
expected_copy_count: 1 monocentric centromere per chromosome; dg/dh otr cassettes 2-10 copies per side
